title: Copper Repeaters and Comparators DP+RP
description: Changes redstone repeaters and comparators to be made out of copper instead of stone. Datapack and resourcepack.
body:
This pack includes both a **datapack** and a **resourcepack**, which **can be used independently** if you only want one or the other, but I recommend you use both.
This pack was made to give copper a bit more use and to make repeaters and comparators look a bit cooler.

Compatible with **VanillaTweaks' 3D Items** _(see below!)_

If you have any **questions, comments or suggestions**, please post them on the project's [Planet Minecraft page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/copper-repeaters-and-comparators-dp-rp/).

# Datapack:
The recipes for redstone repeaters and comparators are **changed** to require **copper ingots** instead of stone.
The vanilla recipes are **overriden**, you can't craft them with stone anymore.

# Resourcepack:
Repeaters and comparators have a **new copper look**, drawn by me based on the vanilla textures. Repeaters **change oxidation level** depending on the delay you set.

# Installation:
Put the **datapack** zip (the name has **DP** in it) in your world's _datapacks_ folder, and the **resourcepack** zip (the name has **RP** in it) in your _resourcepacks_ folder.

# Compatibility:
This datapack **is compatible** with VanillaTweaks' "3D Items" texture pack. If you use it remember to put this resourcepack **above** 3D Items!

# Credits:
Every texture was drawn by me using GIMP based on the vanilla textures, for the VanillaTweaks compatibility I replicated the structure of their repeater and comparator inventory model's json and tweaked it to refer to my model instead of the vanilla one (this obviously overrides their inventory model when using the two packs together).
Thanks to the people on Stardust Labs' Discord server for giving me tips and feedback.

# License:
Do not redistribute the textures included in these packs without permission. Please give credit if you use this in a modpack, datapack-pack or resourcepack-pack.
